'''Driller machines''' resembled huge [[Drill/Legends|drills]] attached to a wheeled mobility system. They were a development of the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]], who utilized them as excavation vehicles. Their purpose was to burrow their way through the ground to find hidden stores of [[Mineral/Legends|minerals]] beneath the surface of a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. They were twenty-one [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in diameter and nearly thirteen meters in length. Due to the size of the drill itself, visibility was often heavily reduced, which required these machines to be crewed by a large number of [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] operators as well as navigational specialists, who would guide the drivers onto the correct path.
